title: Poch: U.S. can win WC despite no top 100 players
summary: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino believes his team can win the World Cup despite lacking players ranked in the global top 100. The statement reflects confidence in the squad's collective strength and tactical approach.
content: United States men's national team coach Mauricio Pochettino said his team can win the World Cup despite not having any players ranked among the top 100.

zh.title: 波切蒂诺：美国可以赢得世界杯，尽管缺乏前100名球员
zh.summary: 美国男足主教练毛里西奥·波切蒂诺相信他的球队尽管缺乏全球排名前100的球员，但仍可以赢得世界杯。这一言论反映了他对球队整体实力和战术方法的信心。

title: Iran players: U.S. visa denials create 'tension'
summary: Iran's national team forward Mehdi Taremi criticized U.S. visa denials and restrictions on a Somali referee for damaging the country's international image. The visa issues are creating tension within Iran's World Cup preparations.
content: Iran national team forward Mehdi Taremi said that steps the U.S. government has taken regarding the denial of visas and preventing a Somali referee from entering the country are hurting the country's image.

zh.title: 伊朗球员：美国签证拒签引发"紧张局势"
zh.summary: 伊朗国家队前锋梅赫迪·塔雷米批评美国的签证拒签和对索马里裁判的限制措施损害了伊朗的国际形象。签证问题正在伊朗的世界杯准备中造成紧张局势。

title: USWNT gets scrappy win as Brazil sees 8 reds
summary: The U.S. women's national team defeated Brazil 1-0 in a contentious match where Sophia Wilson scored an own goal and Brazil was shown eight red cards. Brazil finished with only nine players on the pitch due to the disciplinary issues.
content: Sophia Wilson forced an own goal in the second half for the United States in a scrappy 1-0 win over Brazil in Fortaleza on Tuesday night in which the home side finished with nine players and was shown a total of eight red cards.

zh.title: 美国女足艰难赢球，巴西8名球员被罚下
zh.summary: 美国女子国家队在一场激烈的比赛中以1-0击败巴西，其中索菲亚·威尔逊打入乌龙球，巴西被出示8张红牌。由于纪律问题，巴西最终只有9名球员在场上。

title: Messi scores in cameo in front of 88K in Alabama
summary: Lionel Messi scored from the penalty spot in a 70th-minute cameo appearance before 88,000 fans in Alabama as Argentina defeated Iceland 3-0. The match marked Messi's return from muscle fatigue ahead of the World Cup.
content: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

zh.title: 梅西在阿拉巴马州88000观众面前出场破门
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在阿拉巴马州88000名球迷面前进行了第70分钟的客串出场，通过点球破门，帮助阿根廷3:0战胜冰岛。这场比赛标志着梅西在世界杯前从肌肉疲劳中的回归。

title: Official: Somalian ref had suspected terror ties
summary: U.S. officials confirmed that Somali referee Omar Artan was denied entry due to "association with suspected members of terror organizations." The decision came ahead of the World Cup tournament.
content: A United States official said Tuesday night that Omar Artan, the Somalian referee who was denied entry into the country ahead of the World Cup, was refused admission due to "association with suspected members of terror organizations."

zh.title: 官方确认：索马里裁判涉嫌恐怖组织关联
zh.summary: 美国官员确认，索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦因"与恐怖组织嫌疑人的关联"被拒绝入境。这一决定是在世界杯锦标赛前做出的。

title: Utd confirm Sancho among stars leaving on free
summary: Jadon Sancho will leave Manchester United as a free agent at the end of June after five years with the club, originally costing €85 million. His departure marks the end of an unsuccessful tenure at Old Trafford.
content: Jadon Sancho will officially leave Manchester United as a free agent at the end of June, five years after an €85 million ($99.98m) move.

zh.title: 曼联确认桑乔等球星以自由身离队
zh.summary: 杰登·桑乔将以自由身在6月底离开曼彻斯特联队，结束他在俱乐部为期五年的生涯，当年加盟费为8500万欧元。他的离队标志着他在老特拉福德任期的结束。

title: Real Madrid anger Atleti with $173M Álvarez bid
summary: Real Madrid has submitted a €150 million bid for Atlético Madrid striker Julián Álvarez, which was rejected. The bid intensifies the transfer battle for one of Europe's most sought-after forwards.
content: Real Madrid have entered into a transfer battle with Barcelona after announcing they have had a €150 million ($173m) bid turned down for Atlético Madrid forward Julián Álvarez.

zh.title: 皇马1.73亿美元报价激怒马竞争夺阿尔瓦雷斯
zh.summary: 皇家马德里向马竞前锋朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯提交1.5亿欧元报价，遭到拒绝。这份报价加剧了争夺欧洲最受追捧前锋之一的转会争夺战。

title: Real Madrid poised to confirm Mourinho return
summary: Real Madrid is set to announce the return of José Mourinho as manager after his departure from Benfica. The managerial appointment marks Mourinho's second stint at the Spanish club.
content: Real Madrid are set to confirm the return of José Mourinho on Wednesday after the coach's previous club, Benfica, announced his departure.

zh.title: 皇马即将确认穆里尼奥回归
zh.summary: 皇家马德里准备宣布何塞·穆里尼奥在离开本菲卡后的回归担任主教练。这次任命标志着穆里尼奥在这家西班牙俱乐部的第二次执教。

title: 📈 Ranking the 50 best players in the World Cup
summary: ESPN ranks the top 50 players competing in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, showcasing the world's elite talent. The rankings highlight the quality of performers expected at the tournament.
content: The 2026 FIFA World Cup will feature the world's best talent. Let's rank the top 50 players who will be there!

zh.title: 📈 2026年世界杯50位最佳球员排名
zh.summary: ESPN公布了2026年国际足联世界杯参赛50位顶级球员排名，展示世界最高水平的人才。排名突出了本届赛事所期待的表现质量。

title: Final World Cup predictions: Winners, Golden Ball,...
summary: ESPN's experts provide their final predictions for the 2026 World Cup, including tournament winners and Golden Ball award forecasts. The predictions reflect last-minute analysis ahead of the tournament.
content: The 2026 World Cup has almost arrived! It's time for ESPN's experts to make their picks for silverware, surprise results and everything in between.

zh.title: 世界杯最终预测：冠军、金球奖...
zh.summary: ESPN专家为2026年世界杯提供最终预测,包括赛事冠军和金球奖获得者的预测。这些预测反映了赛事前夕的最后时刻分析。

title: World Cup Daily LIVE: One day to go as Mexico prep...
summary: ESPN provides live updates from across the U.S., Mexico, and Canada as the World Cup begins on Thursday. The coverage captures final preparations and excitement from all three host nations.
content: Get all the updates from our reporters across the U.S., Mexico and Canada U.S., Mexico and Canada as the World Cup starts on Thursday.

zh.title: 世界杯日播直播：还有一天,墨西哥准备...
zh.summary: 当世界杯在周四开始时,ESPN提供来自美国、墨西哥和加拿大各地的实时更新。报道捕捉了三个东道国的最后准备和兴奋感。

title: Ian Darke's World Cup preview: Favorites, surprise...
summary: ESPN commentator Ian Darke previews the first 48-team World Cup, discussing potential favorites and surprise contenders. The analysis covers predictions for the tournament trophy and unexpected outcomes.
content: On the eve of the first 48-team World Cup, everyone can dream. But who will win the trophy? And who could surprise us all?

zh.title: 伊恩·达克的世界杯预览：夺冠热门、冷门...
zh.summary: ESPN评论员伊恩·达克预览首届48支球队的世界杯,讨论潜在的夺冠热门和冷门竞争者。分析涵盖了对赛事奖杯和意外结果的预测。

title: The World Cup is almost here! Time for the soccer ...
summary: As the 2026 World Cup begins on Thursday, the focus shifts from pre-tournament discussion to on-pitch action. The tournament is poised to deliver decisive results and settle competitive debates.
content: All of the pre-tournament noise will be drowned out by events on the pitch when thing kick off on Thursday.

zh.title: 世界杯即将开始！足球时刻到来
zh.summary: 随着2026年世界杯于周四开始，焦点从赛前讨论转向球场上的实际行动。本届赛事将产生决定性的结果并解决竞争争议。

title: How Alvarez became Europe's most sought-after striker
summary: Julián Álvarez has become Europe's most coveted striker as he heads to the World Cup aiming to lead Argentina to back-to-back titles. His ascent comes amid a record-breaking transfer bid from Real Madrid.
content: Julian Alvarez heads to the World Cup aiming to fire Argentina to back-to-back triumphs at a time when he is the subject of one the most sensational transfer bids ever made.

zh.title: 阿尔瓦雷斯如何成为欧洲最抢手的前锋
zh.summary: 朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯已成为欧洲最受欢迎的前锋，他前往世界杯旨在带领阿根廷蝉联冠军。他的崛起伴随着皇家马德里创纪录的转会报价。

title: How Sancho's dream Man Utd move ended as a nightmare
summary: Jadon Sancho's Manchester United career has ended as he departs the club after nearly three years without a Premier League appearance. The €85 million signing failed to fulfill expectations at Old Trafford.
content: Jadon Sancho leaves Manchester United, almost three years after his last Premier League appearance for the club.

zh.title: 桑乔在曼联的梦想如何化为噩梦
zh.summary: 杰登·桑乔在曼联的职业生涯已经结束，经历近三年无英超出场后离开俱乐部。这名8500万欧元的引援未能在老特拉福德实现期望。

title: Spurs defender Davies signs new one-year deal
summary: Ben Davies, an experienced Tottenham and Wales defender, has signed a new one-year deal extending his stay at the club to 13 years. This demonstrates the club's confidence in retaining veteran leadership during a period of transition.
content: Experienced Tottenham Hotspur and Wales defender Ben Davies takes his stay at the north London club into a 13th year.

zh.title: 热刺后卫戴维斯续约一年
zh.summary: 经验丰富的托特纳姆热刺和威尔士后卫本·戴维斯签署新的一年合同，延长了他在俱乐部的效力至13年。这表明俱乐部在过渡时期对保留资深领导力的信心。

title: Fresh faces to managerial mayhem - NI's qualifying campaign
summary: Northern Ireland's World Cup qualifying campaign featured significant managerial and personnel changes but ultimately achieved its primary objective of securing continued qualification hopes. The team navigated transition while maintaining competitive viability.
content: A World Cup group qualifying campaign with many talking points for Northern Ireland comes to an end with the main objective achieved - keeping the World Cup dream alive.

zh.title: 新面孔与管理混乱——北爱尔兰的预选赛之路
zh.summary: 北爱尔兰世界杯预选赛经历了重大的管理和人员变更，但最终实现了确保晋级希望继续的主要目标。球队在维持竞争力的同时成功度过了过渡时期。

title: Podcast: Why this Scotland squad feels different
summary: Scotland's squad demonstrates cohesion built on strong club mentality and decisive selection decisions, with head coach Steve Clarke securing full player buy-in. This unity marks a significant shift in the team's collective approach and dynamics.
content: Scotland’s club mentality, big selection calls and why Steve Clarke has full buy‑in

zh.title: 播客：为什么这支苏格兰队感觉不同
zh.summary: 苏格兰队展现了建立在强大俱乐部精神和果断选拔决策基础上的凝聚力，主教练史蒂夫·克拉克获得了全体球员的认可。这种团结标志着球队集体方法和动态的重大转变。

title: Celtic linked with Tahirovic as Reynolds attracts Rangers - gossip
summary: Celtic is linked with midfielder Tahirovic while Rangers pursue right-back options, and Dundee United faces competition for a winger. These moves reflect ongoing squad-building activity across Scottish clubs as the transfer window evolves.
content: Midfielder linked with Celtic as Rangers look at right-back while Dundee United face competition for winger.

zh.title: 凯尔特人关注塔希罗维奇，雷诺兹吸引流浪者队 - 转会传言
zh.summary: 凯尔特人与中场球员塔希罗维奇有联系，流浪者队追求右后卫，邓迪联队面临争夺边锋的竞争。这些举措反映了苏格兰各俱乐部在转会窗口期间持续的建队活动。

title: Scotland 'living dream' thanks to 'humble' superstar Weir
summary: Caroline Weir scored four goals against Israel to help Scotland top their Women's World Cup qualifying group, though she credits team effort for the achievement. Her performance underscores Scotland's growing strength in women's international football.
content: Caroline Weir insists it is a team effort after her four goals against Israel ensure Scotland top their Women's World Cup qualifying group.

zh.title: 苏格兰因'谦逊的'超级巨星韦尔而'梦想成真'
zh.summary: 卡罗琳·韦尔在对阵以色列的比赛中打进四球，帮助苏格兰在女子世界杯预赛小组中排名第一，尽管她将成就归功于球队的努力。她的表现突显了苏格兰在女子国际足球中日益增强的实力。

title: 'Different' Clarke bids to smash Scotland's glass ceiling
summary: Scotland head coach Steve Clarke approaches a crucial World Cup opener against Haiti with renewed optimism and a sense of transformation in the team's mentality. His outlook signals an attempt to break through previous limitations and achieve greater success.
content: The Scotland head coach feels like a new man heading into a seismic World Cup opener with Haiti - and he is sensing a fresh wave of optimism.

zh.title: '与众不同的'克拉克力图打破苏格兰的玻璃天花板
zh.summary: 苏格兰主教练史蒂夫·克拉克带着重新的乐观态度和对球队心态变化的期待，迎接与海地的世界杯关键首战。他的前景预示着突破以往限制、取得更大成就的努力。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 3
summary: BBC Football presents an interactive guessing game challenging readers to identify a World Cup player in as few attempts as possible. The feature engages fans during the tournament with a focus on testing knowledge of participating stars.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁?猜世界杯球星第3期
zh.summary: BBC足球频道推出互动猜测游戏,挑战读者尽可能少的尝试次数内辨别一名世界杯球员。该功能在比赛期间吸引球迷,重点测试参赛球星的知识。

title: The wild hip-hop parties that started Tuchel's journey to England boss
summary: Thomas Tuchel pursues the distinction of becoming the first foreign manager to win the World Cup, with BBC Sport tracing his unconventional path from hip-hop parties to England manager. His journey highlights the diverse background and experiences that shaped his managerial career.
content: Thomas Tuchel is bidding to become the first foreign manager to win the World Cup. BBC Sport charts the start of his journey to becoming England boss.

zh.title: 疯狂的嘻哈派对开启图赫尔成为英格兰主帅的旅程
zh.summary: 托马斯·图赫尔追求成为首位赢得世界杯的外籍主教练的殊荣,BBC体育追踪了他从嘻哈派对到英格兰主帅的非常规路径。他的职业生涯突出了塑造他执教生涯的多元背景和经历。

title: Who will win the World Cup? BBC pundits make their predictions
summary: BBC pundits share their predictions for the 2026 World Cup, including expectations for surprise contenders and performances by England and Scotland. The analysis provides expert perspectives on potential outcomes and standout teams.
content: Who will win, who might spring a surprise and how will England and Scotland do? BBC pundits predict what will happen at the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 谁将赢得世界杯?BBC专家做出预测
zh.summary: BBC专家分享了他们对2026年世界杯的预测,包括对冷门球队和英格兰、苏格兰表现的期待。该分析提供了专家对潜在结果和杰出球队的观点。

title: 'I designed football shirts for World cup winners'
summary: Rob Warner created Italy's distinctive royal blue kit, which the team wore when winning the World Cup in 2006. His design work exemplifies the important role of kit design in football's most prestigious tournament.
content: Rob Warner created Italy's royal blue kit in which they lifted the trophy in 2006.

zh.title: 我为世界杯冠军设计了足球球衣
zh.summary: 罗布·沃纳为意大利设计了标志性的皇家蓝球衣，该球队在2006年赢得世界杯时穿着这套衣服。他的设计工作体现了球衣设计在足球最负盛名赛事中的重要作用。
